title: carthamus lanatus var. creticus
intro: Carthamus lanatus var. creticus, also known as Cretan Safflower or False Safflower, is a plant species within the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and carotenoids, which are believed to provide several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Carthamus lanatus var. creticus, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used in modern herbalism to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
